# FSVolume.SetXattrPolicy.mustReplace

**Case**

Set the value, but fail if the extended attribute doesn’t already exist.

## Declaration

```swift
case mustReplace
```

## Declaring a policy

- **FSVolume.SetXattrPolicy.alwaysSet**: Set the value, regardless of previous state.
- **FSVolume.SetXattrPolicy.mustCreate**: Set the value, but fail if the extended attribute already exists.
- **FSVolume.SetXattrPolicy.delete**: Delete the value, failing if the extended attribute doesn’t exist.
